column1: PER-PAGE KEYWORD SETS — Primary + Secondary + Long-Tail Variations

For each page: use PRIMARY keyword in title, H1, URL slug, and meta description. Weave SECONDARY keywords into H2s, body paragraphs, and image alt text. Use LONG-TAIL variations in FAQ sections, subheadings, and supporting sentences. Aim to naturally include all keywords — never stuff.
KEY:   🔑 PRIMARY = own this word in the page's title/H1/URL  |  2️⃣ SECONDARY = weave into H2s and body  |  🔍 LONG-TAIL = FAQ sections, supporting sentences, alt text
